name: formfillm
description: Privacy-first local LLM form filling with informed consent.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
